title: Northwind schedules TinyETL integration webinar for merchants
summary: Co-hosted with TinyETL to showcase no-code connectors for Shopify and BigCommerce, with live demos of faster data onboarding.

title: Northwind achieves SOC 2 Type II for Watchtower and Pulse
summary: Demonstrates commitment to enterprise security and trust for mid-market brands and marketplaces.

title: Pulse adds anomaly detection and seasonal baselines
summary: Aims to cut alert noise by learning traffic and conversion patterns across weekdays and seasons.

title: Northwind partners with TinyETL to accelerate data onboarding
summary: Formal technology partnership to co-build no-code connectors and align go-to-market.
